compliance_gaps: The provided document is an aggregate SASRA Supervision Annual Report for the entire DT-SACCO sector, not a specific SACCO's annual report. Therefore, specific governance data for individual SACCOs cannot be extracted.
Details on individual board members (names, roles, election status, independence, attendance rates) are not available in this aggregate report.

The existence, composition (chairperson, member count, meeting frequency, independent majority) of specific SACCO committees (Audit, Credit, Supervisory, Governance) cannot be confirmed from this aggregate report.
The report does not explicitly mention whether an independent governance audit was conducted for any SACCO or the sector, nor does it name an accredited governance auditor.
The CEO's voting status at the board level is not mentioned in the report.
While 'insider lending reports' are mentioned (Page 83), there is no explicit confirmation of a 'conflict of interest register' being maintained by SACCOs.
Specific related party loan figures for directors and staff are not provided in the report.
